title: Universal Tool Heavy Duty Camp Axe Hatchet with Sheath Buckshot - Survival Prep
description:
This Hatchet has a 3-1/2" blade face and a 11" Full Tang steel body. Its textured rubber handle gives it a good feel in your hand. The resin dipped body adds extra durability and feel. Includes protective plastic snap sheath. This axe is great for cutting branches and chopping or splitting wood for campfires. The flattened butt can also be used as a hammer if necessary. Specifications: Blade Face: 3-1/2", Height: 11", Blade to Butt: 4-1/2"

Universal Tool Heavy Duty Camp Axe Hatchet with Sheath Buckshot - Survival Prep

This Hatchet has a 3-1/2" blade face and a 11" Full Tang steel body. Its textured rubber handle gives it a good feel in your hand. The resin dipped body adds extra durability and feel. Includes protective plastic snap sheath.

Key Features

  • Heavy duty camping axe with full tang handle from solid one piece forged stainless steel
  • Exceptional power to weight ratio at 1.62 pounds; Sharp and durable 4 inch blade with large hammer face pommel on the back
  • Cleave through wood easily with the partially curved, ergonomic handle fitting well in your hand
  • Easily make a camp fire and perform general camp ground duties with this item added to your camping gear
  • Hard plastic button snap sheath is designed to allow you to quickly access and use of your hatchet for camping and survival. The straps on the back of the sheath allow you to hang and secure it

Product Specifications

  • MPN: H-7543
  • UPC: 151288531745
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 11 in

This axe is great for cutting branches and chopping or splitting wood for campfires. The flattened butt can also be used as a hammer if necessary.

Specifications: Blade Face: 3-1/2", Height: 11", Blade to Butt: 4-1/2"
